title: SchemaDefinition

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

name.description: Short identifier name for this schema (e.g., 'health_obs_v1').

description.description: Optional human-readable description of what data this schema models.

fields.description: Ordered list of EntityField definitions making up this schema.

links.description: Optional hypermedia links to further documentation or upstream schemas.

description: A logical schema composed of typed EntityField definitions, serving as the structural and semantic contract for a Dataset, API payload, or storage schema.
